name: winccoa-ctrllang
description: Language support for WinCC OA CTRL and CTRL++ - syntax highlighting, goto definition
author: RichardJanisch

languageModelTools.name: ctl_syntax_check
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check CTL files for syntax errors. Returns list of errors with line numbers, messages, and severity. Use when the user asks to validate code, check for errors, or analyze CTL files.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check CTL code for syntax errors

file.description: Absolute path to the CTL file to check

languageModelTools.name: ctl_get_diagnostics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get all diagnostics (errors, warnings, info, hints) for a CTL file. Use when the user wants detailed analysis, warnings, or complete diagnostic information about their code.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get all diagnostics for a CTL file

file.description: Absolute path to the CTL file

languageModelTools.name: ctl_get_symbol_info
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get hover information for a symbol at a specific position in a CTL file. Returns function signatures, variable types, documentation. Use when the user asks what a function does, wants to see a signature, or needs information about a symbol.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get information about a CTL symbol

file.description: Absolute path to the CTL file

languageModelTools.name: ctl_find_references
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find all references to a symbol across the workspace. Use when the user asks where a function is used, wants to see all usages of a variable, or needs to refactor code.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find all references to a CTL symbol

file.description: Absolute path to the CTL file

languageModelTools.name: ctl_goto_definition
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the definition location(s) of a symbol. Use when the user asks where a function is defined, wants to jump to a declaration, or needs to find the source of a symbol.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find the definition of a CTL symbol

file.description: Absolute path to the CTL file

languageModelTools.name: ctl_get_documentation_link
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the official WinCC OA documentation link for a CTL function/method. Returns ONLY the URL to the documentation page. Use when user says 'read the docs', 'check the documentation', or 'you're using this function wrong'. If no link found in database, search the web for 'WinCC OA [functionName] documentation'.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get official WinCC OA documentation link for a CTL function

functionName.description: Name of the CTL function/method to look up (e.g., 'dpGet', 'dpConnect', 'getValue'). Do not include parentheses.

winccoa.ctrlLang.pathSource.description: How to resolve WinCC OA project paths
enumDescriptions: Auto-detect from workspace (searches for config/config file in all workspace folders)
Automatically detect from selected WinCC OA project (requires Core extension)

winccoa.ctrlLang.projectPath.description: Main WinCC OA project path (only used when pathSource is 'manual')

winccoa.ctrlLang.installPath.description: WinCC OA installation path (only used when pathSource is 'manual')

winccoa.ctrlLang.subProjects.description: List of subproject paths (only used when pathSource is 'manual')

winccoa.ctrlLang.additionalScriptsPaths.description: Additional scripts folders to search in (only used when pathSource is 'manual')

winccoa.astyleFormatter.enabled.description: Enable Astyle code formatting for .ctl/.ctrlpp files

winccoa.astyleFormatter.binaryPath.description: Custom path to astyle binary. If empty, uses WinCC OA installation path (bin/astyle or bin/astyle.exe)

winccoa.astyleFormatter.configPath.description: Custom path to astyle config file. If empty, uses WinCC OA installation path (config/astyle.config)

winccoa.syntaxCheck.enabled.description: Enable WinCC OA native syntax checking

winccoa.syntaxCheck.executeOnSave.description: Run syntax check automatically when saving .ctl/.ctrlpp files

winccoa.templates.autoSuggest.description: Automatically suggest template insertion when creating new .ctl files

scripts.ci:integration: npm ci && npm run compile && npm run test:integration
scripts.clean:out-tests: node -e "try{require('fs').rmSync('out/test',{ recursive:true, force:true, maxRetries:10, retryDelay:200 })}catch(e){console.warn('clean:out-tests skipped:', e.message)}"
scripts.compile: npm run build:functions && tsc -p ./ && cd language-server && tsc -p ./
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.style-check: npm run format:check && npm run lint
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run test:integration:coverage
scripts.test:integration:coverage: npm run compile:tsc && npm run clean:coverage:integrationTests && vscode-test --label integrationTests --coverage --coverage-output coverage/integrationTests --coverage-reporter lcov --coverage-reporter html --coverage-reporter json-summary --coverage-reporter text-summary
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run compile:tsc && npm run clean:coverage:unitTests && vscode-test --label unitTests --coverage --coverage-output coverage/unitTests --coverage-reporter lcov --coverage-reporter html --coverage-reporter json-summary --coverage-reporter text-summary
